name: Readeck
description: Save web pages to read and keep forever
compose:
name: slashnode-readeck
services:
  web:
    image: codeberg.org/readeck/readeck:0.22.3
    container_name: readeck
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      READECK_LOG_LEVEL: info
      READECK_SERVER_HOST: 0.0.0.0
      READECK_SERVER_PORT: '8000'
      READECK_LOG_FORMAT: text
      READECK_SECRET_KEY: ${secret.APP_SEED}
    volumes:
      - web_data:/readeck
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8026:8000
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data:
    name: slashnode-readeck_web_data
